name: Sanso Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sanso Electric Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacturing and selling of motors, pumps, and system solution products in Japan. Its products include magnetic drive, self-priming magnetic drive, self-priming centrifugal, cast-iron line, automatic shallow-well, and centrifugal pumps, as well as desalination and sansolver systems. The company was founded in 1957 and is based in Himeji, Japan.
